body: The named tuple that contains parameters in named `p` in a couple of functions in the [convecting plankton example](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/blob/b15d2d0e7204e66a74e51e9ed2a0f2214315b62a/examples/convecting_plankton.jl#L102). I think this is unnecessarily confusing since the plankton concentration `P` appears in the same lines. This fixes that.
title: Changes parameters name from p to params
